events.label: assistant
events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`. The color legend given is correct per APWA/CGA standard, but the field crew misread the marks — a critical safety non-compliance under 811/CGA best practices since confusing utility identification risks striking an electric or gas line. Decision: **fail**, risk **critical**, with corrective actions to stop work and re-verify locates before proceeding past rough-complete.
